name: GSOC S.I.T.F RP
description: the S.I.T.F is the Primary Combat Unit of GSOC that undertakes the more High Profile Missions GSOC has to offer, their Uniform is typically dependent on the Nationality of the Operators, with varying Gear selections and weapons. the S.I.T.F was first founded in 1970 by GSOC, The S.I.T.F was first deployed alongside MACV SOG in Vietnam, and later, got deployed to the Persian Gulf against Saddam Hussein. since then, the S.I.T.F has undertaken 3517 confirmed successful Operations, and 13 failed Operations, think of them as GSOC's version of the SCP Foundation's MTF Unit.
creator: Exetior the Arch-demon
